premise_set: P := p_a + Axioms 1-5 + Assumption 6 + emitted OPH nodes D1-D10 + current public D12 quark objects
theorem_statement: On the present premise set P, the corpus does not emit Theta_ud^mass, Theta_ud^phys, or Theta_ud^abs.

non_derivable_objects.reason: P emits the D12 one-parameter mass ray but not a theorem-grade nonzero modulus t1.
P emits the negative selector closure sigma_ref and no sector-attached same-label left-handed lift from sigma_ref to the physical CKM shell.
P carries the affine mean split only on a target-anchored current_family_only witness and does not emit target-free physical-sheet scales (g_u, g_d).
